mapper.sql: id, patent_id, patent_no, author, author_code, author_name, author_unit, author_ranking, author_type, author_dept_id, author_division, is_first, work_ratio, note, edu_degree, edu_level, title, sex
mapper.select: select spia.id as rowId, spia.author as author, puser.name as authorName, spia.author_type as authorType, ccspt.name as authorTypeName, spia.author_code as authorCode, spia.sex as sex, spia.sex as sex, case when spia.sex=0 then '女' when spia.sex=1 then '男' else '' END as sexName, spia.edu_degree as eduDegree,csed.name as eduDegreeName, spia.edu_level as eduLevel,csel.name as eduLevelName, sauthororder.code as authorRanking,sauthororder.name as authorRankingName, spia.title as title,ccsti.name as titleName,spia.work_ratio as workRatio from srm_patent_info_author spia left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=spia.author left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=spia.author_dept_id left join ct_srm_person_type ccspt on ccspt.code=spia.author_type left join ct_srm_title_info ccsti on ccsti.code=spia.title left join ct_srm_edu_degree csed on csed.code=spia.edu_degree left join ct_srm_edu_level csel on csel.code=spia.edu_level left join ct_srm_paper_author_order sauthororder on sauthororder.code=spia.author_ranking where patent_id=#{parentId}
